blocking_policy: Tests 1 and 3 require Docker image; Test 2 run locally

tests.reason: pen_assemble.verification.mechclass not available locally (needs MECH-CLASS v0.5.1 Docker image). To run: docker run pen-stack/biophysics:0.1.0 python scripts/04_retrospective_recovery_validation.py

caveats: Witte 2025 positions are placeholder (5 of 12; full list needs SI Table S1)
Position alignment to CAST_VK (A0A8M0FGU0) not verified; evoCAST numbered relative to PseCAST TnsB
maximize_aav_deliverability objective uses size-preference heuristic, not evoCAST fitness function
PACE evolved under DNA integration pressure, not AAV delivery; objective mismatch expected
tests.recommended_action: Complete Witte 2025 position alignment to CAST_VK before asserting failure

tests.reason: pen_assemble.verification.structure not available locally (needs Boltz-1 + GPU). To run: docker run --gpus all pen-stack/design:0.1.0 python scripts/04_retrospective_recovery_validation.py

note: Tests 1 and 3 require infrastructure not available on Windows local machine. Test 2 fails but with significant methodological caveats (position alignment). Full validation should be run on VM with GPU before final Part C claim. Current State: Strategy C designs are preliminary; awaiting full retrospective gate.
